variants.title: HiFi Filter SA 17463 Air Filter
variants.description: Genuine HiFi Filter SA 17463 Air Filter. Easy to install and replace, the SA 17463 is built to withstand demanding environments, offering long-lasting protection and reliability. Whether used in automotive, agricultural, construction, or industrial applications, this filter is an essential component for maintaining system health and performance.

variants.title: Donaldson P629543 Air Filter, Primary Round | Replaces the HiFi Filter SA 17463
variants.description: Why Choose Donaldson Replacement Filters? Replacement filters for Mann+Hummel® Entaron Air Cleaners deliver superior performance and proven protection. • High-efficiency cellulose media is a proven performer across a wide range of heavy-duty diesel engine applications. • Unique sawtooth design compresses to cushion and hold the filter in place, providing a secure seal – even in severe environments. • RadialSeal™ design allows for fast filter changes. • Durable structural support protects filters from damage or collapse in heavy vibration applications or humid conditions.

variants.title: Mann Filter C 21 600 Air Filter | Replaces the HiFi Filter SA 17463
variants.description: High-quality MANN-FILTER air filters for clean air intake and optimum protection for your engine, mass air flow sensor & other sensitive components / They meet requirements of modern engine technology. Highest dirt holding capacity and dirt separation efficiency, low flow resistance and high pleat stability ensure functional reliability during the entire service interval.
